statement.en: Detection of topological errors in distribution networks using state estimation residual patterns

proposer: Martin Castin, Alireza Bahmanyar, Adrien Leerschool et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper is dated 2026-04-25 (future date from training cutoff), marked peer-reviewed but provisional status uncertain. Core claim—topological error detection via residual patterns in distribution networks—is technically sound in principle (CLASS-B domain) but validation status unknown. Future publication date prevents definitive TRUE classification; methodology appears plausible but requires full peer review confirmation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: ネットワークの境界を越える「ねじれ」が、隠れた誤りの幽霊を映し出す。

visualGlyph.interpretation: ネットワークの正常な流れ（外円）と潜む奇形（内の破線）が、蛇のように巻き付く誤りを暴露する。
